framework.name: Government Security Circular (Sikkerhedscirkul aeret)
framework.scope: Requirements for handling classified government information in Danish public sector
framework.structure_description: Requirements organized by domains: classification, personnel security, physical security, IT security, transport and transmission, security breaches, and security organization.

controls.title: Classification levels for information
controls.description: Government information must be classified at four levels: TOP SECRET, SECRET, CONFIDENTIAL, and RESTRICTED.
controls.description_nl: Statslig information skal klassificeres i fire niveauer: YDERST HEMMELIGT, HEMMELIGT, FORTROLIGT og TIL TJENESTEBRUG.

controls.title: Classification of digital systems
controls.description: IT systems processing classified information must be classified at least at the same level as the highest classified information they process.
controls.description_nl: IT-systemer der behandler klassificeret information skal klassificeres mindst pa samme niveau som den hoejest klassificerede information de behandler.

controls.title: Marking of classified information
controls.description: All classified information must be clearly marked with the correct classification level on all pages and media.
controls.description_nl: Al klassificeret information skal vaere tydeligt maerket med det korrekte klassifikationsniveau pa alle sider og medier.

controls.title: Regular reassessment of classification
controls.description: Classification levels must be reassessed regularly and declassified when the need for protection no longer exists.
controls.description_nl: Klassifikationsniveauer skal revurderes regelmaeessigt og nedklassificeres nar behovet for beskyttelse ikke laengere er til stede.

controls.title: Security clearance of personnel
controls.description: Personnel with access to classified information must be security cleared at the relevant level by the Danish Security and Intelligence Service (PET).
controls.description_nl: Personel med adgang til klassificeret information skal vaere sikkerhedsgodkendt pa det relevante niveau af Politiets Efterretningstjeneste (PET).

controls.title: Levels of security clearance
controls.description: Security clearance is issued at levels RESTRICTED, CONFIDENTIAL, SECRET, and TOP SECRET corresponding to the information classification.
controls.description_nl: Sikkerhedsgodkendelse udstedes i niveauerne TIL TJENESTEBRUG, FORTROLIGT, HEMMELIGT og YDERST HEMMELIGT svarende til informationsklassifikationen.

controls.title: Security instructions to personnel
controls.description: All security-cleared personnel must receive written security instructions and acknowledge receipt.
controls.description_nl: Alt sikkerhedsgodkendt personel skal modtage en skriftlig sikkerhedsinstruks og bekraefte modtagelsen.

controls.title: Need-to-know principle
controls.description: Access to classified information must be granted exclusively on a need-to-know basis regardless of security clearance level.
controls.description_nl: Adgang til klassificeret information skal gives udelukkende pa need-to-know-basis uanset sikkerhedsgodkendelsesniveau.

controls.title: Security zones for classified information
controls.description: Premises where classified information is processed or stored must be established as security zones with physical access control.
controls.description_nl: Lokaler hvor klassificeret information behandles eller opbevares skal vaere etableret som sikkerhedszoner med fysisk adgangskontrol.

controls.title: Storage of classified information
controls.description: Classified information must be stored in approved security cabinets or security rooms when not in active use.
controls.description_nl: Klassificeret information skal opbevares i godkendte sikkerhedsskabe eller sikkerhedsrum nar den ikke er i aktiv brug.

controls.title: Destruction of classified information
controls.description: Classified information must be destroyed using approved methods (cross-cut shredding, incineration) when no longer needed.
controls.description_nl: Klassificeret information skal destrueres ved brug af godkendte metoder (krydsmakulering, forbranding) nar den ikke laengere er nodvendig.

controls.title: Approval of IT systems for classified information
controls.title_nl: Godkendelse af IT-systemer til klassificeret information
controls.description: IT systems intended to process classified information must be approved (accredited) by the responsible security authority.
controls.description_nl: IT-systemer der skal behandle klassificeret information skal godkendes (akkrediteres) af den ansvarlige sikkerhedsmyndighed.
controls.implementation_guidance: Kontakt CFCS for akkreditering af systemer til FORTROLIGT og derover. Dokumenter systemets sikkerhedsarkitektur.

controls.title: Encryption of classified information
controls.description: Classified information CONFIDENTIAL and above must be encrypted with approved encryption products during electronic transmission.
controls.description_nl: Klassificeret information FORTROLIGT og derover skal krypteres med godkendte krypteringsprodukter ved elektronisk transmission.

controls.title: Network separation for classified systems
controls.description: Systems processing classified information CONFIDENTIAL and above must be physically separated from internet-connected networks.
controls.description_nl: Systemer der behandler klassificeret information FORTROLIGT og derover skal vaere fysisk adskilt fra internetforbundne netvaerk.

controls.title: Handling of removable media
controls.description: Removable media containing classified information must be marked, registered, and stored with the same protection as the classified material.
controls.description_nl: Flytbare medier med klassificeret information skal maerkes, registreres og opbevares med samme beskyttelse som det klassificerede materiale.

controls.title: Physical transport of classified information
controls.description: Classified information must be transported in sealed envelopes with recipient receipt. SECRET and above requires courier.
controls.description_nl: Klassificeret information skal transporteres i forseglede konvolutter med modtagerkvittering. HEMMELIGT og derover kraever kurer.

controls.title: Electronic transmission of classified information
controls.description: Electronic transmission of classified information must use approved encrypted communication systems.
controls.description_nl: Elektronisk transmission af klassificeret information skal ske via godkendte krypterede kommunikationssystemer.

controls.title: Reporting of security breaches
controls.description: Any breach of security for classified information must be immediately reported to the security organization and the responsible authority.
controls.description_nl: Ethvert brud pa sikkerheden for klassificeret information skal straks rapporteres til sikkerhedsorganisationen og den ansvarlige myndighed.

controls.title: Investigation of security breaches
controls.description: Security breaches must be investigated to determine the extent of compromise and prevent recurrence.
controls.description_nl: Sikkerhedsbrud skal undersoges for at fastslaa omfanget af kompromittering og forebygge gentagelse.

controls.title: Appointment of security officer
controls.description: Every authority processing classified information must appoint a security officer responsible for compliance with the security circular.
controls.description_nl: Enhver myndighed der behandler klassificeret information skal udpege en sikkerhedsansvarlig med ansvar for sikkerhedscirkul aerets overholdelse.

controls.title: Security control and inspection
controls.description: The authority security officer must conduct regular security controls and inspections of classified material.
controls.description_nl: Myndighedens sikkerhedsansvarlige skal gennemfoere regelmaessige sikkerhedskontroller og inspektioner af klassificeret materiale.
